title: Deep Mob Learning: Refabricated
description: Alternative, server friendly mob loot acquisition
body:
Deep Mob Learning: Refabricated is a rework of the original Deep Mob Learning mod for modern versions of Minecraft.

 

The mod is focused in providing an alternative way of acquiring mob loot in Minecraft, putting the player in intense duels with the Matrix Glitches in order to extract some matter out of it.

 

This mod is still in development, any bug reports, suggestions, contributions, etc are welcome.

 

 

Check out our Discord guild for support, suggestions, feedbacks, or just chatting around

 

 

 

How to Play

Unfortunately we don't have any ingame tutorial yet, but you can check out or wiki on GitHub, it will teach you everything you need to know about the mod. Soon I'll be implementing a Patchouli of ingame book, but we don't have it done for now :/

 

I need your help

No, I'll not be asking for money.

I'm not having too much time to play and work on the balance of the mod items and mechanics. My job, my school and the development of DML itself takes so much time that I just can't play.

So I'd like to hear the opinion of people who are actually playing with it, tell me what you are thinking of the mod so far. Report me bugs, broken mechanics, too OP items (or even items that needed to be more powerful than they actually are), etc. I'd be grateful to hear everyone's opinion, just leave a comment in this section and I'll read and I'll consider your opinion.

 

It also Features

Roughly Enough Items (REI) Integration

This mod provides integration with REI. If you have it installed you will be able to see all the custom recipes in-game.

 

Highly Customizable

This mod features a highly-customizable environment. If you are a server owner or a modpack creator, most of the mod's behavior can be changed via datapacks and config files. Check this out.

 

If you have ModMenu installed, you can easily access some settings from the ingame esc menu.

 

Easter Eggs (?)

Not sure about this one, you may have to find it out by yourself.

 

Open Source

As most of the Minecraft mods, Deep Mob Learning: Refabricated is completely open source and accepting every kinds of contributions. Check this out.

 

Special Thanks

I'd like to thank the original author of this mod, Iteration Funk, for supporting the idea and letting me use most of his resources and concepts. Check out his Discord guild, he has a lot of cool mods and modpacks.

 

This is a beta, there is much more coming

You can check out our issues, tasks and milestones to see whats planned. Feel free to leave a feedback there.
